Flooring Done Right, Tulsa Strong

Expert flooring installation and repair across Tulsa and surrounding communities. Quality craftsmanship, guaranteed.

Call Now: +19189827491

Get a FREE Estimate Today!

Decades of Dedication to Tulsa Flooring

Pearson and Sons Flooring Specialist isn't just another contractor – we're a Tulsa institution. For over a decade, we've been laying the foundation for homes and businesses across Green Country, one meticulously installed plank at a time. Founded by two brothers with a shared passion for quality and a deep understanding of Tulsa's unique needs, we've built our reputation on hard work, honesty, and unwavering commitment to our clients.

Our Flooring Contractor Services

Affordable and stylish laminate flooring that mimics the look of hardwood and tile.

Learn More →

Vinyl Flooring

Waterproof and comfortable vinyl flooring for kitchens, bathrooms, and basements.

Learn More →

Carpet Installation

Comfortable and stylish carpet installation for homes and businesses.

Learn More →

Floor Repair

Expert floor repair services to restore the beauty and integrity of your floors.

Learn More →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our flooring contractor services.

What types of hardwood are best for Tulsa's climate?

Engineered hardwood and properly sealed solid hardwood are excellent choices for Tulsa. We recommend considering options that are resistant to moisture changes.

How often should I refinish my hardwood floors?

Typically, hardwood floors should be refinished every 7-10 years, depending on foot traffic and wear. We offer free inspections to assess your floor's condition.

What is the average cost of hardwood flooring installation?

The cost varies depending on the type of wood, the size of the area, and the complexity of the installation. We provide free, detailed quotes to help you budget effectively.

Reviews From Our Flooring Contractor Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Pearson and Sons did an amazing job installing new hardwood floors in our Brookside home. The team was professional, efficient, and the floors look absolutely beautiful. They even helped us choose the perfect stain to match our existing furniture. Highly recommend!"

Sarah G. Hardwood Flooring

"We hired Pearson and Sons to install tile in our kitchen and bathrooms. The quality of the work was excellent, and the price was fair. There was a slight delay due to weather, but they communicated proactively and kept us informed throughout the process."

Michael B. Tile Flooring

"Pearson and Sons installed laminate flooring in our basement. The team was professional, efficient, and the floors look great. They even cleaned up after themselves, which was a huge plus. Great value for the price!"

Jessica K. Laminate Flooring
